title: The Hartford's New Research Finds 4 In 10 U.S. Workers Will Scale Back On Employee Benefits During Open Enrollment Due To Inflation
text: HARTFORD, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--New research from The Hartford, a leading provider of employee benefits and absence management, found 40% of U.S. workers reported inflation will make them scale back on the employee benefits they choose during open enrollment. title: Hartford Financial Continues To Outperform With Its Differentiated Model
text: Hartford has continued to outperform, with two more quarters of better-than-expected underwriting profitability and strong premium growth. Commercial P&C pricing continues to slow, while personal auto is pressured by increasing loss severity and delayed rate actions from regulators.

title: The Hartford Appoints Edmund Reese To Its Board Of Directors
text: HARTFORD, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Hartford today announced the appointment of Edmund Reese to the company's board of directors, effective Oct. 17, 2022. He will serve on the board's Finance, Investment and Risk Management Committee as well as the Audit Committee. “Reese is an accomplished financial leader with deep experience in investments, strategy, operations and product launches during his time with several trusted and admired companies,” said The Hartford's Chairman and CEO Christopher

title: The Hartford Launches New Property Choice® And Enhanced General Liability Choice® Product Offerings
text: HARTFORD, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Hartford is launching enhanced versions of its proprietary Property Choice and General Liability Choice products to further serve the needs of its business customers across a broad range of industries and account sizes.
